name: STAND: Survive, Team-up, And Never Die
short_description: Team up with survivors, customize your character, and combine over 70 weapons and items to defend your central tower against endless waves of enemies. Choose your skills, craft insane synergies, and unleash chaos in intense bullet-hell combat.
detailed_description:
STAND: Survive, Team-up And Never Die is a brutal tower defense roguelike set in a devastated world overrun by zombies, mutants… and much worse.

Team up with survivors, customize your character, and combine over 70 weapons and items to defend your central tower against endless waves of enemies. Choose your skills, craft insane synergies, and unleash chaos in intense bullet-hell combat.

FEATURES

  • 75+ Weapons & Items

  • Permanent Skills upgrade

  • 5 Chapters

  • Multiple Difficulty Modes

  • Character customization over 200+ outfits

  • Steam Achievements & Leaderboards

  • Endless Replayability

And now with the Free Uptade, dive even deeper into the madness with 3 more chapters in the new Plagues of Oblivion expansion !

Get ready to crush waves of monsters straight outta Oblivion ! Load up your heroes with epic gear and spells to wreck spiders and dragons in three all-new chapters. Try out new combos and last as long as you can !

FEATURES

  • 60+ New Weapons, Spells & Items

  • New Skills

  • 3 New Chapters

  • 14 New enemy types

There may be improvements and visual differences between the screenshots, trailer, and the actual game. As a solo developer, I cannot remake an entire trailer for each update. Thanks for your understanding.

Survive. Team-up. And Never Die.
